title: Thinouia paraguaiensis

This family comprises a wide variety of plants, including trees, shrubs, and herbs. Thinouia paraguaiensis is native to the tropical regions of South America, particularly in the Paraguay and Brazil areas. It is a small shrub with fragrant leaves and is often used in traditional medicine. Thinouia paraguaiensis is also known for its potential antioxidant properties.
